title: astragalus rigidulus
intro: Astragalus rigidulus, also known as the rigid milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the western United States and Canada. It is a member of the pea family and has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties that help to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions such as fatigue, anxiety, and respiratory issues. Astragalus rigidulus is often prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or tea form, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
